name: ReviewSubmissionGateway

neutralConcepts: executionOrder: eligibility=1, validation=2, SETNX=3, audit=4, storeDocument+emit=5
rating must be integer in [1,5] — validated before SETNX
ineligible submissions do not create audit records

ironRules.rule: eligibilityService.check() MUST be called at executionOrder=1 — before any write, before SETNX, before validation.
Rating validation (range [1,5]) at executionOrder=2 — before SETNX. Invalid rating emits ReviewRejected(invalid_rating) without consuming idempotency slot.
SETNX at executionOrder=3 — idempotency key is the server-derived reviewId hash. Duplicate returns ReviewRejected(duplicate_review).
auditService.storeDocument() at executionOrder=4 — ONLY for eligible, valid, non-duplicate submissions.
storeDocument() BEFORE enqueue() — DNA-8 outbox pattern. ReviewAccepted + ReviewSubmissionCompleted emitted together at executionOrder=5.
reviewId is a server-derived deterministic hash — never read from event.reviewId payload.

keywords: review submission eligibility first audit order SETNX idempotency server-derived reviewId hash rating validation
